title: Indulgent Polish Cheese Pie
description: A malty, pillowy Polish cheese pie that melts in the air fryer, perfect for festive gatherings or a cozy lunch.
instructions: In a bowl whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt until even.
Add melted butter and milk to the dry mixture, stirring until a soft dough forms.
Divide the dough into four equal portions and roll each into a round about 1/2 inch thick.
Place the dough rounds in the air fryer basket, ensuring they do not touch.
Air fry for 5 minutes until the crust starts to turn golden.
Remove the crusts and spread shredded cheese, parsley, garlic powder, and pepper over each.
Return to the air fryer and cook for an additional 8 minutes until the cheese is melted and the crust is crisp.
Let the pies rest for 2 minutes before cutting.
Serve hot, enjoying the creamy, malty center and flaky crust.
